channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Graffiti tagging, 28th May
item.description:
Graffiti tagging

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 70-74, City Road, Finsbury, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead rat, 28th May
item.description:
Dead rat outside the building
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cobden Walk, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Grass on the communal lawn needs cutting, 28th May
item.description:
Lawn by da1 4jz is maintained by council contractors but they have not cut it and it is at least 18 inches high and looks unsightly and unkempt and not in keeping with the area. Please can this be sorted ASAP.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crayford Way, Crayford, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pile of furniture on street, 28th May
item.description:
See above

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Foulden Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large number of paint containers dumped, 28th May
item.description:
This has become a regular spot for fly tipping - Grangehill Road between Earlshall Road and Greenvale Road by the electricity substation.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Grangehill Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Damage to bench, 28th May
item.description:
The bench is broken

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Clarence Road, Deptford
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter Issue, 28th May
item.description:
Nasty litter issue in the gutters along this side of Bevington Road. I really think a public litter bin is needed along this stretch of Manor Road as there is nothing from the High Street, all the way to the shops up on Bromley Road, near Crescent Road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bevington Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: No boundary markings for the pavement parking, 28th May
item.description:
There is parking allowed on the pavement, however the boundary lines are no longer visible, therefore vehicles are constantly parked outside the allocated parking area causing an obstruction to pedestrians and other vehicles. The lines have recently been marked on all the other streets but this one.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Myrtle Road, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree pushing fence over, 28th May
item.description:
The tree is too big and requires pruning. It's pushing the fence over. It is hanging in people's faces as they walk on the path.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bourne Vale, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping near my pathway, 28th May
item.description:
Fly tipping outside my property outside my house were my bins are located on collection day which is obstructing use of area. Looks like an old radiator, hob, iron poles, broken done wood and a baby mattress. Has been left there for nearly a week 9 Stonecroft Road Erith Kent

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Stonecroft Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping rubble us atill there, 28th May
item.description:
I reported this yesterday and received an update that it had been resolved. It has not. The rubble is still there

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 140, Old Kent Road, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tip, 28th May
item.description:
This evening outside of the wheat sheaf hall again one blue bag full of rubbish again dumped on the railings outside of the wheat sheaf hall

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ermine Side, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Wood and shopping trolley dumped, 28th May
item.description:
Wood and shopping trolley dumped in alley way between 28 and 36 Hervey Road

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hervey Road, Kidbrooke
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lower branches grown a long way over our fence and low on the path., 28th May
item.description:
This tree wasn't cut back or pollarded as nicely as the others in the street.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Garden Avenue, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Left turn arrow on light is gone, 28th May
item.description:
The left turn arrow on the traffic light on the Euston Road & Gray’s Inn Rd is gone. Inside wires completely exposed.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): A501, King's Cross, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street litter, 28th May
item.description:
Hello. We moved to this street 2 months ago, it hasn't been swept in this time and there is lots of litter around. There is most of it at the beginning of the street but also a bit further down on the sides where cars are parked. It gives an awful look to the street and it's not hygienic. Thank you for your attention on this matter.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Queen's Road, East Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish between Hamilton Close and Steers Way, 28th May
item.description:
Rubbish bins, mattress, and trolley left at the alleyway between Hamilton Close and Steers Way

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hamilton Close, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Furniture and cardboard boxes dumped, blocking access to sheds, 28th May
item.description:
Sheds are currently unaccessible due to the flytipping of furniture and cardboard. Also presents a fire hazard and vermin risk.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Southwark Park Road, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: ReReporting - oven and suitcases dumped, 28th May
item.description:
Re reporting as the previous ticket was closed and I was told to "contact caretaking". I have been told by Caretaking to log tickets ans there are signs everywhere telling residents to report this. Do not close until its sorted please or I will file a complaint as this is the 2nd time you've closed tickets without then issue being resolved This mess has just increased...

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Burrage Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned Barriers, 28th May
item.description:
Bromley Road near junction of Whitefoot Lane Can the barriers which are closing the crossing on both sides be removed Thus crossing was closed due for a Riad traffic accident some weeks ago

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bromley Road, Southend, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Pavement Defect (uneven surface / cracked paving slab)
